title: thalictrum minus subsp. matritense
intro: Thalictrum minus subsp. matritense, also known as meadow rue, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Thalictrum minus subsp. matritense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive problems, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary issues. Herbal preparations of Thalictrum minus subsp. matritense include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
